name: Lovable Lingerie Limited
summary: Lovable Lingerie Limited manufactures and sells women's innerwear in India. Its products include brassieres, panties, slips/camisoles, homewear, shapewear, foundation garments, and sleepwear products. The company also provides athleisure, bottoms, capris, long tops, printed tracks, shorts, and tops. The company offers its products primarily under the Lovable, Daisy Dee, and College Style brands. Lovable Lingerie Limited was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
